title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF MALITBOG AND SOGOD, PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2939 / 55 OG No. 40, 8447 (October 5, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2600, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF MALITBOG AND SOGOD, PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. The sitio of Punong in the Municipality of Sogod, Province of Leyte, is hereby converted into a barrio to be known as Barrio La Purissima Concepcion.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
